stemHtml: Given this METAR: LFPG 150505Z 27015KT 9999 SCT016 OVC024 M09/M12 Q1006 NOSIG. Which interpretation is correct?

options.a: Report time is 15:05 UTC, scattered clouds at 1600 ft AMSL, dewpoint is minus 12°C.
options.b: Visibility exceeds 10 km, cloud base at 2400 ft, temperature is 6°C below zero.
options.c: Report time is 05:05 UTC, temperature is 9°C, weather expected to remain stable.
options.d: Wind is westerly at 15 kt, temperature is minus 9°C, QNH is 7 hPa below standard.
